Notes: Single UPDATE adds two A RRs for the same owner with differing TTLs to probe whether the server normalizes, rejects, or accepts the RRset.

Steps.Description: Attempt to add two A RRset members for host5.campus.edu. with different TTLs in one UPDATE.

Steps.Name: host5.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the resulting A RRset and authoritative response after the UPDATE.
